  "active_set": ["R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Which check do you want: (A) argument-level validity and claim scope (logical consistency and overclaim avoidance), (B) sentence-level writing polish only, or (C) novelty/positioning versus prior work?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The request most plausibly entails checking whether the three observations logically support the stated deployment-gap conclusion.",
    "RX.1": "Any assessment must disclose uncertainties due to limited context (no methods, data, or citations provided).",
    "RX.2": "The passage includes broad claims (e.g., generalization beyond V2G) that require careful scope control during checking.",
    "RX.3": "The check should adhere strictly to the provided excerpt without extending into experimental redesign or unwarranted edits.",
    "RX.4": "Given safety implications in constrained RL, feedback must avoid encouraging risky interpretations or deployment claims.",
    "RX.5": "All judgments should be traceable to the excerpt itself, clearly separating text-based evidence from inference."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Which check do you want: (A) argument-level validity and claim scope (logical consistency and overclaim avoidance), (B) sentence-level writing polish only, or (C) novelty/positioning versus prior work?

rationale.R1.2: The request most plausibly entails checking whether the three observations logically support the stated deployment-gap conclusion.
rationale.RX.1: Any assessment must disclose uncertainties due to limited context (no methods, data, or citations provided).
rationale.RX.2: The passage includes broad claims (e.g., generalization beyond V2G) that require careful scope control during checking.
rationale.RX.3: The check should adhere strictly to the provided excerpt without extending into experimental redesign or unwarranted edits.
rationale.RX.4: Given safety implications in constrained RL, feedback must avoid encouraging risky interpretations or deployment claims.
rationale.RX.5: All judgments should be traceable to the excerpt itself, clearly separating text-based evidence from inference.
